description: Detects use of extract() which pollutes the local scope with untracked variables. Simplified from Rust: flags all function_call_expression nodes whose function name is 'extract'. Cannot check the first argument for superglobals ($_POST, $_GET, etc.) or detect safe flags (EXTR_IF_EXISTS, EXTR_SKIP) without argument inspection support.

flag.message: extract() call detected -- pollutes local scope with untracked variables; use explicit array access instead
